name: Google Reverse Image Search
description: Reverse image search engine; upload or paste an image URL to find visually similar images and source pages. Referenced in sinwindie's Image Analysis bookmarklet tool.
bestFor: Finding where a photo of a missing person appears online and locating matching or related images
opsec: Queries are logged to your Google account; use a clean browser/session for sensitive investigations.
bestInteractionPattern: Paste image URL or upload image directly via the search-by-image interface or bookmarklet that appends &image_url=

name: Yandex Reverse Image Search
description: Reverse image search engine widely regarded as strong for facial matching and Eastern European / Russian content. Referenced in sinwindie's Image Analysis bookmarklet tool.
bestFor: Face-matching and finding photos of a person, especially strong for face crops and non-Western sources
opsec: Russian-operated service; avoid uploading sensitive evidence and assume queries are logged.
bestInteractionPattern: Paste image URL or upload; bookmarklet appends url= to the search endpoint

name: TinEye
description: Reverse image search engine focused on exact and modified copies of an image, with oldest-first sorting to trace an image's origin. Referenced in sinwindie's Image Analysis bookmarklet tool.
bestFor: Tracing the earliest known appearance of a photo and finding edited copies
opsec: No login required for basic searches; API and bulk use are paid.
bestInteractionPattern: Paste image URL or upload; bookmarklet appends /search/?url=
notes: Bookmarklet form: https://www.tineye.com/search/?url= . API is paid; web search is free.

name: Bing Visual Search
description: Microsoft Bing reverse/visual image search. Referenced in sinwindie's Image Analysis bookmarklet tool.
bestFor: Cross-engine reverse image lookups to corroborate or extend results from other engines
opsec: Queries logged to Microsoft account if signed in; use a clean session.
bestInteractionPattern: Paste image URL; bookmarklet appends imgurl: to the visual search endpoint

name: Baidu Image Search
description: Baidu reverse image search, useful for Chinese-language and China-hosted content. Referenced in sinwindie's Image Analysis bookmarklet tool.
bestFor: Reverse image lookups for Chinese sources and content not indexed by Western engines
opsec: Chinese-operated service; do not upload sensitive evidence.
bestInteractionPattern: Paste image URL; bookmarklet appends image= parameter

name: Jeffrey's Image Metadata Viewer (EXIF)
description: Online EXIF/metadata viewer that extracts embedded metadata (including GPS coordinates, camera info, timestamps) from a photo by URL or upload. Referenced in sinwindie's Image Analysis bookmarklet tool as 'EXIF'.
bestFor: Pulling GPS geolocation and timestamps out of photos to place a missing person at a location/time
opsec: Image URL or upload is sent to a third-party server; avoid for evidence requiring chain-of-custody.
bestInteractionPattern: Paste image URL; bookmarklet appends ?url= to exif.cgi

name: Removeddit
description: Service that displays Reddit comments and posts that have been removed or deleted, by swapping reddit.com in a URL for removeddit.com. Referenced in sinwindie's Reddit bookmarklet tools.
bestFor: Recovering deleted Reddit posts/comments by or about a missing person
opsec: Third-party archive of Reddit; may be intermittently offline (Pushshift-dependent services have had outages).
bestInteractionPattern: Replace 'www.reddit.com/' with 'www.removeddit.com/' in a thread URL via bookmarklet
notes: Reliability varies; alternatives like unddit/Pushshift-based viewers may be needed if offline.

name: GetLinkInfo
description: URL expander/unshortener that reveals the destination and metadata behind shortened links. Referenced in sinwindie's MISC URL Expander bookmarklet.
bestFor: Safely expanding shortened links shared by or about a subject to reveal the true destination
opsec: Submitting a link reveals it to a third-party service; do not preview links that could tip off a subject.
bestInteractionPattern: Append a shortened URL to ?link= and load

name: CheckShortURL
description: URL unshortener that expands short links and shows the full destination and link safety info. Referenced in sinwindie's MISC URL Expander bookmarklet.
bestFor: Expanding shortened URLs to their true destination during link analysis
opsec: Link is submitted to a third-party service for resolution.
bestInteractionPattern: Append a shortened URL to expand.php?u= and load

name: ExpandURL
description: URL expander that resolves shortened links to their final destination. Referenced in sinwindie's MISC URL Expander bookmarklet.
bestFor: Resolving shortened links to their true destination during link analysis
opsec: Link is submitted to a third-party service for resolution.
bestInteractionPattern: Append a shortened URL to expand?&url= and load

name: The Silph Road
description: Pokemon GO community travelers' card/profile directory; lets you look up a player's public Silph card by username. Referenced in sinwindie's PokemonGo bookmarklet tools.
bestFor: Finding a Pokemon GO player's public profile/card by username to corroborate an online identity
opsec: Public community directory; only returns profiles users chose to publish.
bestInteractionPattern: Append username to https://sil.ph/ to load a player's card
notes: Niche gaming-community identity corroboration; relevance is situational.

name: PokeBattler Profiles
description: Pokemon GO tools site with searchable user profiles. Referenced in sinwindie's PokemonGo bookmarklet tools.
bestFor: Searching for a Pokemon GO player profile by username/handle
bestInteractionPattern: Use the profiles search with ?search= parameter

name: TrainerDex
description: Pokemon GO trainer progress/profile database; look up a trainer's public profile by username. Referenced in sinwindie's PokemonGo bookmarklet tools (legacy trainerdex.co.uk).
bestFor: Looking up a Pokemon GO trainer's public profile by username
bestInteractionPattern: Append username to the user profile path /u/
notes: Source listed legacy https://www.trainerdex.co.uk/u/ ; current project domain is trainerdex.app. Verify live URL before use.

name: SULTAN (Username Search Tool builder)
description: Sinwindie's own Python-based framework/script for building a username search tool across many sites, driven by a spreadsheet of site templates (SULTAN.py, SULTAN_DATA.xlsx). Distributed in the repo with a how-to PDF.
bestFor: Bulk-checking a username across many platforms to find a missing person's social footprint
opsec: Runs locally so queries are not logged by a third-party SaaS; configure your own request pacing/proxies to avoid rate-limit blocks.
bestInteractionPattern: Local Python script; feed a username and run against the bundled site list
notes: Requires Python and the bundled SULTAN_DATA.xlsx. Conceptually similar to Sherlock/WhatsMyName. Includes RequestsValidator.py.
